extortion.description: UPDATE!  About  The legacy of FEAM AERO began when a two-man aircraft maintenance operation set out to relentlessly accomplish one thing: to become the world’s leader in aircraft line maintenance services.  30 years later, FEAM has accomplished exactly that, while never losing sight of where we came from or our commitment to safety, quality, and putting people first. As a proud family-owned and veteran-owned operation, FEAM places missions over markets because when you take care of people, business is inevitable. It is because of our employees’ relentless effort and entrepreneurial spirit that we were able to grow into a global leader in Line Maintenance.  Headquarters: 657 South Dr Ste 306, Miami, Florida, 33166, United States Phone Number: (305) 871-3758
